signInDescription: Sign in to your account to manage projects
signUpDescription: Create an account to create projects
resetPasswordDescription: Enter email to send recovery link
checkEmail: Check your email to confirm registration
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can now sign in.
developerDescription: I create and manage my own projects
partnerDescription: I refer clients and earn commissions
managerDescription: I manage projects for other developers

partnerInvitation: You are registering by partner invitation:
setPasswordDescription: For your account security, you need to create a password
passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters

invalidRecoverySession: Invalid recovery session. Redirecting to login...
marketingEmailsConsent: I agree to receive marketing emails from Gridix about new features, updates, and offers.
essentialEmailsNote: We will still send essential service and security notifications related to your account.
